project.title: SAINS
project.one_liner: Legacy PHP web application for university admission exam preparation, online courses, and practice exams.
project.description: Spanish-language PHP/MySQL application with a public landing page, authenticated course area, exam-related flows, downloadable study materials, video content, and payment integrations.

prerequisites: PHP runtime with PDO MySQL and compatibility for legacy mysql_* calls
setup_steps: This repository does not include a documented one-command local setup.
Review and replace database settings in Connections/sains.php and Connections/database.php with local values before running locally.
Serve the directory through a PHP-capable web server and use index.php as the public entry point.
Provision a MySQL schema containing tables referenced in source code, including usuarios, reactivos, tronco, and catalogo_preparatorias.

cv_bullets.bullet: Built a PHP/MySQL web application for university-admission exam preparation with public landing, login, and authenticated dashboard flows.
cv_bullets.notes: The public and authenticated entry points explicitly query MySQL and redirect users between login and member areas.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented session-gated access control for member areas using PHP sessions and redirect checks.
cv_bullets.notes: Both authenticated entry points perform session checks before rendering member functionality.

cv_bullets.bullet: Integrated multiple preparation experiences, including admission-exam simulators, a professional-profile exam, demo exams, and a course hub.
cv_bullets.notes: UI flows and form targets are explicit in the source, but several referenced exam directories are absent from this snapshot.

cv_bullets.bullet: Served downloadable study guides and printable exam materials directly from versioned PDF assets.
cv_bullets.notes: The member dashboard links directly to bundled PDFs for guides and sample exam material.

cv_bullets.bullet: Added payment capture flows for PayPal checkout and Conekta-based OXXO cash orders.
cv_bullets.notes: PayPal forms are embedded in the dashboard and the backend endpoint creates Conekta OXXO cash orders, but local execution also depends on SDK files not present in this tree.

cv_bullets.bullet: Built AJAX endpoints for dependent selectors over states, municipalities, and preparatory schools during onboarding or data capture.
cv_bullets.notes: The endpoints query catalogo_preparatorias and emit HTML option lists for chained selects.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented server-side JSON delivery for DataTables-backed class and video listings, including paging, filtering, ordering, and guide downloads.
cv_bullets.notes: The videos endpoint follows the DataTables server-side protocol and generates guide download cells in the response.

cv_bullets.bullet: Integrated Vimeo-hosted educational video playback into course content.
cv_bullets.notes: The endpoint uses the Vimeo SDK and is called from the course UI, but it expects a parent-level vendor autoload file that is not present in this snapshot.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented account-verification UX with verification-code submission and resend actions after registration.
cv_bullets.notes: The verification page accepts a code, supports resend, and is tied to the landing-page onboarding flow.

cv_bullets.bullet: Rendered exam-result views with subject-level breakdowns and both Ceneval-style and conventional result labels.
cv_bullets.notes: The result fragment defines per-subject counts and dual result labels for the exam experience.

red_flags.issue: Git metadata is missing from the workspace, so remotes, tracked files, and commit history could not be verified from .git data.
red_flags.notes: git rev-parse --show-toplevel and git rev-list --count HEAD both failed because this directory tree is not attached to a Git repository.

red_flags.issue: Secrets are hard-coded in source files.
red_flags.notes: Database credentials and third-party API credentials are committed directly in PHP files and should be rotated and removed from version control.

red_flags.issue: The repository snapshot is incomplete for local execution.
red_flags.notes: The code references missing paths such as htmls/, files-serverside/, remote_files/, p_inicio/, funciones/, js/, imagenes/, vendor/, jquery-ui-1.12.1.start, jquery-ui-1.12.1, and multiple examen_* directories.

red_flags.issue: The codebase mixes deprecated ext/mysql calls with PDO.
red_flags.notes: This indicates a legacy PHP stack and likely runtime constraints for modern PHP versions.

red_flags.issue: Repository-level stats are inflated by bundled third-party distributions committed to the tree.
red_flags.notes: The workspace includes vendored library source and documentation, so file-count and LOC totals are not a pure measure of first-party application code.
